calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioners Jeri Elaine Taylor and Michael Wallace Taylor present in pro per for the minor, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Joshua Salamander Taylor.
Decree signed in open court.
